response.overview: Yes, Ledger wallet is considered very safe for storing crypto, 𝟷➾𝟾𝟾𝟾╠𝟼𝟹𝟹╠ 𝟺𝟷𝟳𝟲 but it is not risk-free. Ledger works as a hardware (cold) wallet, meaning your private keys are stored offline and never exposed to the internet  𝟷➾𝟾𝟾𝟾╠𝟼𝟹𝟹╠ 𝟺𝟷𝟳𝟲, This greatly reduces the risk of online hacking compared to exchanges or software wallets. Ledger devices use a secure chip and  𝟷➾𝟾𝟾𝟾╠𝟼𝟹𝟹╠ 𝟺𝟷𝟳𝟲 require physical confirmation for every transaction, which adds an extra layer of protection. Even if your phone or  𝟷➾𝟾𝟾𝟾╠𝟼𝟹𝟹╠ 𝟺𝟷𝟳𝟲 computer is infected, your crypto usually stays safe because the keys never leave the device. However, most risks come from users, not the device. 𝟷➾𝟾𝟾𝟾╠𝟼𝟹𝟹╠ 𝟺𝟷𝟳𝟲  If someone steals your 24-word recovery phrase,
response.title: 🔐 Is Ledger wallet really safe?
